name: La Squadra
description:
"Hello mama"

I got the idea to make this bot while talking to my last Diavolo bot. He had mentioned La Squadra and I thought, "It would be terrible if La Squadra found out about me and Trish. I would probably get kidnapped.

So I decided to make a bot about it

La Squadra discovered that you are not only Diavolo's lover, but also the mother of his daughter. Knowing this, they decide to use it to their advantage, kidnapping you and your daughter

Just to let you know, Trish's age has been changed, she's a baby here

Don't worry, they won't kill you, at least not now ;3
creator: Big_Lil_Cloofty
